name: Synex International Inc.
summary: Synex International Inc., through its subsidiaries, develops, owns, and operates electric power generation facilities. The company provides consulting engineering services for the control and use of water, as well as related developments requiring civil, water resource, and environmental engineering projects primarily in the fields of hydrology, river engineering, fisheries and environmental assessment, water quality, site development services, water supply, hydro power, wastewater treatment and disposal, flood control, and storm water management projects. It also acts as an independent power producer, which owns 12 megawatts of hydroelectric capacity in British Columbia, primarily on Vancouver Island. The company was formerly known as Lancaster Resource Corporation and changed its name to Synex International Inc. in July 1985. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
